title: johnstonella albida
intro: Johnstonella albida is a species of flowering plant in the family Orobanchaceae, commonly known as the yellow false foxglove or yellow false blountia, which is a type of parasitic plant that obtains its nutrients by connecting to the roots of other plants. The medicinal properties of Johnstonella albida include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of consuming this plant are said to include the reduction of inflammation, improvement of respiratory health, and potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Johnstonella albida are typically made by infusing the plant's leaves and flowers in hot water, and can also be found in capsule or tincture form.
